title: HB's Performance Baseline Pack (Forge)
description: Lean Minecraft forge 1.20.1 performance modpack designed to consolidate the most important and most effective performance mods available on this version. The client side version of this mod does not support servers.
body:
HB's Baseline Performance modpack is a pack built for Minecraft forge 1.20.1 designed to consolidate the most important and most effective performance mods for this version. This pack may serve as a base set of mods to build from, or to benchmark your computer's performance using a lightweight pack and compare your results to mine or others. If you find other mods that significantly improve performance on this version of Forge, please let me know.

**See an overview, my machine specs, data, analysis and comments here:** 
[Docs](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1cYqzNm4nGcLl8Y5TaQ4P13dP_nAp2kxkk3QnawDdJU8/edit?usp=sharing)

### # ATTENTION
This modpack is **clientside only**. See [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hbs-baseline-performance-pack(server)) for a version for indepedent servers which removes the clienside only mods.

Performance Considerations:
- FPS
- Memory Usage
- GPU Utilization
- CPU Utilization
- Efficient Chunk Loading
- Shader Support
- Expensive Terrain Altering Mods (Terralith, Tectonic, tested but not included with pack)
  
Untested Performance Improvements:
- FPS when considering performance demanding blocks (ImmediatelyFast has a good [review](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) )
- FPS/Chunk loading with significant entity spawning (i.e Alex's mobs)
- FPS/Chunk loading with substantial structure generation/real time ore distribution mods
 

**Join my Discord to track or collaborate with my upcoming modded projects:** [Link](https://discord.gg/dp9d4wymNv)
